name: Greater Baltimore Climate Summit
description:
Join UpSurge for our final event in the In Good Company series — BioTech & Life Sciences Networking Mixer at Harbor Designs & Manufacturing! Hosted by @connectlabs.wexford! Connect with Baltimore’s BioTech and life science community. Meet founders, researchers, clinicians, engineers, and industry leaders working across therapeutics, diagnostics, medtech, digital health, and research tools in Maryland.

🕔 5–6 PM: Focus group on BMore Tech Connect
Share your feedback on the Pathways feature and help shape a stronger, more connected life sciences ecosystem.
💵 First 40 participants get a $50 Visa gift card
🔬 Participants can apply for click testing for an extra $250
🍽️ 6–8 PM: Dinner + networking

Keep the conversation going over food and meet potential collaborators, advisors, hires, and partners.

📍 University of Maryland BioPark | 4MLK
4 N. Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd, Baltimore, MD 21201
